---
title: "Conversations on the Catechism: Means of Grace. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Conversations on the Catechism: Means of Grace. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1863
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
